The truth about Snowball

Posted by Thoth on July 6, 2004

Since infiltrating WestConn, I have heard rumors about Snowball. They're all bunk.

Except one...

Every single snowball, including the students who wear the costume, has died in a car crash.

Coincidence? You decide...
